subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-11-15 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: Pray that God may lighten his [Prof. Cheyne's] lamp day by day, cause His Kingdom to be established in the hearts
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @growth of the Cause, @stories; anecdotes, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
